title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aravind Eye Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Aravind Eye Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Aravind Eye Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Surgeon for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Aravind Eye Hospital:
Aravind Eye Hospital is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aravind Eye Hospital!
